name: dev-tools-plugin
description: Developer workflow plugin for git, dead-code analysis, dependency updates, and spec sync tasks.

interface.longDescription: Adds Codex skills and specialist agents for pull requests, dead-code analysis, dependency updates, and spec synchronization.
defaultPrompt: Review this repo for dead code and explain the safe removals.
Update dependencies in this project and note any breaking changes.
Prepare a PR plan for the changes in my current branch.
